title: Record-breaking compensation! Anthropic reaches a $1.5 billion settlement for training on pirated books
excerpt: A federal court in San Francisco has approved a record-breaking copyright litigation settlement agreement, with AI giant Anthropic agreeing to pay up to $1.5 bi
content_html:
A federal court in San Francisco has approved a record-breaking copyright litigation settlement agreement, with AI giant Anthropic agreeing to pay up to $1.5 billion in compensation to book authors. This class-action lawsuit stemmed from the company's large-scale download of unauthorized book works from pirated databases for AI model training in recent years.

According to the details of the court-approved agreement, nearly 480,000 works have been successfully claimed by the authors, who are entitled to approximately $3,000 per book in compensation. In addition to paying this historically highest copyright settlement, Anthropic is also required to completely destroy all pirated files.

Piracy Is Penalized, but AI Training Is Protected

Although the compensation amount is significant, the legal community generally believes this ruling actually represents a key legal victory for the AI industry. The presiding judge previously clearly stated that using legally obtained books to train AI constitutes fair use, and its innovativeness and transformative significance are evident.

This means that the compensation targets the pirated behavior of illegally acquiring resources, not the AI training itself. Although authors retain the right to pursue legal action against AI-generated infringing content and the company's future actions, the clarification of the fair use principle has cleared away a major legal obstacle for the entire AI field.

content_html_zh:
旧金山联邦法院批准了一项破纪录的版权诉讼和解协议，人工智能巨头 Anthropic 同意向图书作者支付高达 15 亿美元的赔偿。 这起集体诉讼源于该公司近年来从盗版数据库中大规模下载未经授权的图书作品用于AI模型训练。

根据法院批准的协议细节，作者已成功索赔近48万件作品，每本书有权获得约3,000美元的赔偿。 除了支付这一历史最高的版权和解金外，Anthropic还被要求彻底销毁所有盗版文件。

盗版受到惩罚，但人工智能培训受到保护

尽管赔偿数额巨大，但法律界普遍认为，这一裁决实际上代表着人工智能行业的一次关键的法律胜利。 审判长此前明确表示，利用合法获得的书籍训练人工智能构成合理使用，其创新性和变革意义显而易见。

这意味着赔偿针对的是非法获取资源的盗版行为，而不是人工智能培训本身。 尽管作者保留对人工智能生成的侵权内容和公司未来行动采取法律行动的权利，但合理使用原则的明确为整个人工智能领域扫清了一大法律障碍。
